title: H-A2 proxy-first robustness test
purpose: Pre-register a second proxy-first H-A2 robustness path before chasing SPY 2022 1-minute bars again.
user_decision_context: The user clarified that SPY 1-minute bars are a method for answering the ORB hypothesis, not the hypothesis itself. If the ORB mechanism is real, lower-resolution evidence should still say something useful about the mechanism before exact replay is pursued again.
hypothesis: The H-A2 macro-conditioned ORB mechanism should show a stable relationship between opening-session behavior, volatility or macro-event regime, and existing option-trade outcomes even when measured through coarser local proxies. If the relationship disappears outside exact 1-minute replay, the hypothesis is too fragile to justify more exact-data effort without revision.
research_question: Can local, no-paid lower-resolution evidence falsify, weaken, or prioritize H-A2 before any further SPY 2022 1-minute bar source work?

allowed_proxy_resolutions: daily macro-event and VIX/VXV regime labels
data_resolution_position.forbidden_interpretation: A proxy pass must not be interpreted as exact 2022-10 ORB entry/exit validation.

planned_tests.question: Does the H-A2 signal direction remain coherent across daily-regime, 15-minute, 5-minute, and existing trade-outcome views?
Is the apparent effect driven by macro-event labels, VIX regime labels, or a combined risk label?
Do the proxy labels agree with already-observed implementable option outcomes without re-tuning on OOS?
Does the proxy evidence collapse when extreme observations or small active buckets are isolated?

split_policy.pre_2023_reference_period: Use only if local data already exists; do not acquire new data from this preregistration.

allowed_claims: H-A2 is weakened at proxy level.
H-A2 remains worth exact-data prioritization at E1 only.
H-A2 should be revised before any further exact-data source work.
1-minute bars remain required only for exact replay, not for mechanism-level proxy testing.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB entries or exits were tested.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not request IBKR data from this preregistration.
Do not buy paid data from this preregistration.
Do not introduce a new provider from this preregistration.
Do not run live LLM calls from this preregistration.
future_run_completion_criteria: All planned tests are run or explicitly marked unavailable with source evidence.
Chronological split and no-OOS-tuning discipline are stated.
MinTRL/PSR/DSR, under-sampled, underpowered, and big-day dependency handling is reported where applicable.
Conclusion uses one project label: ผ่าน, ไม่ผ่าน, or ยังสรุปไม่ได้.
The next action states whether H-A2 should be revised, parked, falsified at proxy level, or prioritized for exact replay.
